criteria.criterionText: Then the Findings section should not show the configured clean findings label
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The report was rendered with one or more findings present. The system correctly suppressed the 'clean findings' label and did not display a 'STERILE DOMAIN BODY' verdict. The expected finding code 'clean-label-with-findings' was observed.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: No further follow-ups are immediately recommended for this specific scenario, as the feature behaved as expected. Consider testing edge cases with varying numbers and types of findings.
